primary_output.evidence_standard_met_reason: Image is clear enough to assess the vehicle's front-end condition despite low brightness; damage is unambiguously visible.
primary_output.claim_status_justification: Customer claims a scratch on the hood from a service visit. Image shows catastrophic front-end destruction: hood torn open, fenders shredded, engine bay fully exposed, structural frame damage. This is far beyond a scratch and inconsistent with a post-service mark. Damage pattern suggests a severe collision, not a service-related scratch.
